skill.name: nerdzao-elite
skill.description: Guides Portuguese engineering work through planning, architecture, TDD, clean code, validation, UX review, and production readiness checks.
skill.summary: Run a senior engineering workflow for Portuguese software projects.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported five high-severity weak cryptographic algorithm matches in SKILL.md. Review found no cryptographic implementation, imports, commands, scripts, network calls, or secret access; the matched lines are skill metadata and workflow prose. The remaining risk is low because the skill uses strong directive language to guide model behavior, but no malicious intent or executable payload was found.

low_findings.title: False Positive Weak Cryptography Match in Description
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged a weak cryptographic algorithm at SKILL.md line 3. The line is the skill description and contains no cryptographic code, unsafe algorithm, or executable behavior.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced line is metadata text only. No evidence found of cryptographic APIs, hashing code, encryption code, or executable files.

low_findings.title: Duplicate False Positive Weak Cryptography Match in Description
low_findings.description: Static analysis reported a second weak cryptographic algorithm match at SKILL.md line 3. The same line remains only a natural-language description, so the duplicate match is not a real security issue.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The duplicate points to the same metadata line as the prior finding. No evidence found of weak cryptography or code execution on that line.

low_findings.title: False Positive Weak Cryptography Match in Role Statement
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged a weak cryptographic algorithm at SKILL.md line 10. The line is a Portuguese role statement for the assistant and does not define or call any cryptographic operation.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced line is plain role-setting prose. No evidence found of cryptographic libraries, algorithm names used as code, or executable instructions.

low_findings.title: False Positive Weak Cryptography Match in Skill References
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged a weak cryptographic algorithm at SKILL.md line 14. The line lists companion skill names and contains no cryptographic implementation or risky command.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced line is a list of skill handles. No evidence found of cryptographic APIs, encoded payloads, network activity, or shell execution.

low_findings.title: Duplicate False Positive Weak Cryptography Match in Skill References
low_findings.description: Static analysis reported a second weak cryptographic algorithm match at SKILL.md line 14. The duplicate points to skill reference text, not to unsafe cryptographic code.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The duplicate points to the same skill-reference line as the prior finding. No evidence found of weak cryptography or executable behavior on that line.

content.value_statement: Complex software tasks often miss planning, tests, design review, and final validation. This skill gives Claude, Codex, and Claude Code a structured Portuguese workflow for senior engineering delivery.
actual_capabilities: Frames tasks with planning and brainstorming before implementation.
Prompts architecture review before code changes begin.
Encourages test-driven development and validation steps.
Adds clean code, refactoring, and production review checkpoints.
Includes UI and UX validation guidance for frontend work.
Operates in Portuguese for Brazilian engineering teams.
limitations: Does not include executable scripts, tools, or automated validators.
Depends on other referenced skills being available in the runtime.
Cannot guarantee pixel-perfect UI without screenshots or browser checks.
Does not replace human review for security, compliance, or release approval.

use_cases.title: Plan a Feature Build
use_cases.description: Structure a new feature from requirements through architecture, tests, implementation, and validation.

use_cases.title: Review Frontend Quality
use_cases.description: Check a UI change for visual consistency, labels, alignment, formatting, and production readiness.

use_cases.title: Prepare Production Code
use_cases.description: Use a repeatable checklist for refactoring, tests, error handling, debugging, and final verification.

prompt_templates.title: Review a Small Task
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner workflow for a focused change.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use nerdzao-elite to plan and review this small coding task in Portuguese: [describe the task]. Include tests and final validation.

prompt_templates.title: Design a Feature
prompt_templates.prompt: Use nerdzao-elite to create a senior engineering plan for this feature: [feature]. Cover architecture, TDD, clean code, UX validation, and release checks.

prompt_templates.title: Audit an Existing Pull Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Use nerdzao-elite to review this pull request: [summary or files]. Focus on architecture, test gaps, errors, UX issues, and production risks.

prompt_templates.title: Lead an End-to-End Build
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced workflow for a full implementation cycle.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use nerdzao-elite as the delivery workflow for this project: [project]. Work through planning, architecture, TDD, implementation, UX validation, production audit, and final verification.

output_examples.input: Plan a checkout redesign for a Brazilian ecommerce site.
output: A Portuguese implementation plan with assumptions, architecture notes, and test strategy.
A UX validation checklist for currency formatting, alignment, labels, and responsive states.
A final production review covering risks and verification steps.
A concise review of code structure, test coverage, error handling, and maintainability.
A final verification checklist for release readiness.

best_practices: Provide repository context, target files, and acceptance criteria before asking for implementation.
Ask for screenshots or browser validation when the task changes UI behavior.
Use the workflow for complete tasks where planning, tests, and review all matter.
anti_patterns: Do not use it for quick one-line answers that do not need a full workflow.
Do not assume referenced companion skills are installed unless the environment confirms them.
Do not treat the output as a substitute for security or compliance sign-off.

faq.question: What language does this skill use?
faq.answer: The skill is written for Portuguese, especially Brazilian engineering workflows.

faq.question: Does it run code or install tools?
faq.answer: No. The reviewed skill file contains instructions only and no executable scripts.

faq.question: Can it help with frontend work?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes UI and UX validation prompts for alignment, labels, formatting, and visual quality.

faq.question: Does it require other skills?
faq.answer: It references several companion skills. Results are best when those skills exist in the active environment.

faq.question: Is it safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The audit found false positive static detections and no malicious behavior.

faq.question: Who should use it?
faq.answer: Developers, designers, and engineering leads who want a structured senior workflow in Portuguese.
